changelog:
v1.1.6 (2026-05-12)

[Render] Add manual image mode: choose local images and skip AI image generation.
[Render] Replace strong Ken Burns movement with smoother cinematic drift to reduce image shake.
[Subtitles] Add SRT text case options: original, lowercase, uppercase, title case.
[Subtitles] Add background box color plus shadow/soft-border styling controls.
